## Type
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — restructure without behavior change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — deps, config, CI, tooling
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy .` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v -m "not integration"` passes
- [ ] Type annotations on all new functions
- [ ] No unrelated changes in this PR
- [ ] New behavior has a test
